goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'friday' and should 'leave after 11:45'.
The train should depart from 'london kings cross' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'price', and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be in the 'south'.
Make sure you get 'hotel type'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on friday and should leave after 11:45
The train should depart from london kings cross and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get train ID, price, and travel time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the south
Make sure you get hotel type
